userQuery: First date tonight, dinner in SoHo. What's the move?

content: For a first date in SoHo, let's focus on looks that are both chic and effortless. We're aiming for a vibe that's confident and slightly elevated, perfect for a night out in the city.

options.title: The Silk Maxi
options.description: A flowing silk maxi dress in a rich caramel hue, paired with delicate gold jewelry and strappy sandals. This look is the epitome of understated elegance and moves beautifully as you walk.

options.title: The Sculpted Cut-Out
options.description: A sleek black dress with subtle cut-out details that add intrigue without being overbearing. Pair it with bold earrings and ankle boots to keep the look modern and edgy.

options.title: The Satin Slip
options.description: Opt for a satin slip dress in a deep navy or emerald for a touch of sophistication. Style it with minimalist heels and a structured clutch to keep the look streamlined and chic.

content: Look 2 is my top pick—it strikes a perfect balance between modern edge and timeless sophistication, making it a standout choice for a night in SoHo.

options.title: The Effortless Chic
options.description: A relaxed-fit silk blouse tucked into high-waisted, dark wash jeans. Style with ankle boots and a delicate chain necklace. The look is easy and flattering, perfect for a cozy yet stylish vibe.

options.title: The Structured Edge
options.description: A tailored blazer over a sleek black tank paired with skinny trousers. Complete with pointed-toe flats and a bold cuff bracelet. This look is polished with an intentional edge, perfect for making a confident statement.

options.title: The Sleek Minimalist
options.description: A fitted midi dress in a deep plum hue, styled with low block heels and a simple clutch. The dress's streamlined silhouette is comfortable and effortlessly chic, ideal for a night out.

content: Look 2 is my top pick—it effortlessly combines structure and edge, ensuring you stand out with confidence and style.

content: For your first day, we want to focus on versatile, polished looks that can adapt to any office culture. A mix of tailored pieces and elevated basics will keep you feeling confident and stylish.

options.title: The Polished Ensemble
options.description: A pair of tailored trousers in a neutral tone, paired with a crisp white button-down and a structured blazer. Complete the look with sleek loafers and a minimalist watch. This look effortlessly balances professionalism and style.

options.title: The Layered Look
options.description: Start with a fitted turtleneck and add a chic blazer or drapey cardigan, paired with dark wash jeans. Swap out sneakers for ankle boots if you need to elevate the look for after-hours. This outfit is all about comfort with a touch of elegance.

options.title: The Effortless Elegance
options.description: Opt for a knit midi dress in a soft hue, styled with simple gold jewelry and classic ballet flats. Add a trench coat for a sophisticated finish that works from day to night. The look is relaxed yet elevated, perfect for making a strong first impression.

content: Look 1 is my top pick—it provides the perfect combination of professionalism and modern style, making it a safe yet impressive choice for any office setting.
Is there a specific industry or dress code you're trying to align with?

userQuery: I have a big presentation and I want to feel confident. I don't usually think about what I wear.

content: For a confident presentation look, we're leaning into tailored precision and polished silhouettes. The focus is on pieces that feel sharp yet approachable, setting the stage for both professional poise and personal style.

options.title: The Structured Statement
options.description: A tailored navy blazer with a crisp white button-down and high-waisted charcoal trousers. Pair with sleek black loafers and a minimalist watch. The structured lines and neutral tones convey authority and sophistication.

options.title: The Layered Elegance
options.description: A soft cashmere sweater layered under a sleek camel coat, paired with straight-leg dark denim. Finish with ankle boots and a structured tote. This look transitions effortlessly from day meetings to an evening dinner.

options.title: The Comfortable Classic
options.description: A tailored black knit top with wide-legged trousers in a rich taupe. Add a pair of polished loafers and understated jewelry for a look that feels luxurious yet relaxed, perfect for a long day followed by a dinner.

content: Look 1 is my top pick—it exudes confidence and professionalism, making it perfect for a high-stakes presentation.
What industry do you work in? This will help refine the final touches for your look.

content: For Fall, we are embracing layers and textures that define the season, focusing on rich, warm tones with a modern twist.

options.title: The Layered Luxe
options.description: A structured wool coat in deep charcoal layered over a soft cashmere turtleneck and sleek high-waisted trousers. Finish with ankle boots and a statement leather bag to carry the look from day to night effortlessly.

options.title: The Cozy Chic
options.description: An oversized cable-knit sweater in creamy beige paired with dark wash straight-leg jeans and knee-high suede boots. Add an oversized scarf for a touch of warmth and style.

options.title: The Bold Statement
options.description: A vibrant rust-colored midi dress with long sleeves and a belted waist for definition. Complement with heeled boots and minimal jewelry to let the color take center stage.

content: Look 1 is my top pick—it perfectly encapsulates Fall's elegance and versatility, making it ideal for both professional and social settings.

content: Let's elevate your work-to-evening wardrobe with some versatile essentials.

items.name: Tailored Blazer
items.description: A tailored blazer instantly elevates any outfit and transitions seamlessly from the office to a dinner setting. Opt for a classic color that complements most of your wardrobe.

items.name: Silk Blouse
items.description: A silk blouse adds a touch of luxury and sophistication to your look. It's perfect for layering under a blazer or wearing on its own for a chic evening out.

items.name: Dark Wash Jeans
items.description: Dark wash jeans are a versatile staple that can be dressed up or down, making them ideal for both work and evening outings in more relaxed settings.

items.name: Pointed-Toe Flats
items.description: Pointed-toe flats offer style and comfort, making them a great option for a long day that smoothly transitions into an evening out.

userQuery: I want to dress more minimally. What should I keep and what should go?

content: To embrace a more minimal style, focusing on sleek silhouettes and versatile pieces is key.

items.name: Structured White Blouse
items.description: A crisp, structured white blouse with clean lines is a staple in any minimal wardrobe. It pairs effortlessly with everything from jeans to tailored trousers.

items.name: Black Tailored Trousers
items.description: These are your go-to for a polished look, whether you're heading to the office or a chic evening event. They offer a streamlined silhouette that flatters all body types.

items.name: Classic Trench Coat
items.description: A trench coat not only provides warmth but elevates any outfit instantly. Its timeless appeal works with practically every piece in your wardrobe.

items.name: Simple Leather Boots
items.description: Choose a pair with a sleek design and minimal detailing. They add a touch of sophistication and are versatile enough for various social settings.
